full_row.What it does: Single dashboard for plant or port operations, vehicle status, stage status, pending actions, and process health.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: One-window operational control, faster review meetings, and common visibility for logistics, security, operations, and management.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Trip/stage data, user roles, vehicle master, process configuration
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Start demos here: show how gate, yard, dock, weighbridge, and alerts come together in one screen.

full_row.What it does: Captures vehicle arrival, validates gate eligibility, and records gate-in timestamp digitally.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Reduces paperwork and manual gate dependency while improving entry discipline and auditability.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Vehicle master, gate checklist, trip/order reference, user login
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Position as the first control point for compliant plant entry.

full_row.What it does: Digitally validates completion of required stages before permitting vehicle exit from plant or port.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves exit control, avoids missed documentation, and creates a clear digital trail.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Stage completion status, checklist status, exit approval rules
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Useful for customers struggling with manual document return and gate-out permission.

feature_name: Vehicle Identification by RFID / ANPR / Manual Entry

full_row.Feature Name: Vehicle Identification by RFID / ANPR / Manual Entry
full_row.What it does: Identifies vehicle using RFID reader, smart camera/ANPR, or controlled manual entry where required.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Reduces wrong vehicle tagging and speeds up gate, yard, and weighbridge processing.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: RFID tags/readers, ANPR camera, vehicle master, manual override SOP
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Explain this as flexible identification based on customer infrastructure maturity.

full_row.What it does: Controls vehicle movement through signals and boom barriers based on validation and process status.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves safety, removes uncontrolled movement, and supports automated gate discipline.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Boom barrier, traffic signal, controller, validation logic
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Show how system approval physically controls vehicle movement.

full_row.What it does: Verifies vehicle and driver documents such as RC, fitness, permit, insurance, and driving license where integrations are enabled.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves compliance, reduces manual document checking, and helps prevent blacklisted/non-compliant entry.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Government portal access, vehicle number, driver details, integration scope
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Position as compliance automation at the plant or port gate.

full_row.What it does: Checks vehicle, driver, transporter, or vendor status against configurable blacklist/whitelist and remarks master.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Prevents restricted assets from entering and standardizes exception handling.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Blacklist/whitelist master, vehicle/driver/transporter master
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use this for customers needing security and vendor compliance control.

full_row.What it does: Digitizes gate checklist fields such as purpose, vehicle condition, document details, material, seal number, and security approval.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Reduces repetitive manual entry and creates searchable digital records.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Configurable checklist fields, user role, mobile/tablet/web access
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Highlight that fields can be configured as per plant or port SOP.

full_row.What it does: Captures or validates driver and vehicle documents during entry and key operational stages.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves readiness for audit and reduces missing document delays.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Document list, image/PDF upload permission, validation workflow
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Useful where physical papers currently move from gate to office and back to exit.

full_row.What it does: Captures vehicle, cargo, and seal images with location and timestamp at gate, loading, unloading, or inspection stages.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Strengthens shipment integrity, reduces disputes, and enables evidence-backed investigation.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Mobile/tablet camera, location permission, configured image fields
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Position as audit-proof visibility, especially for sealing, condition checks, and exceptions.

full_row.What it does: Records who approved entry/exit, when approval happened, and which validations were completed or overridden.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Creates accountability and reduces dependency on handwritten gate passes.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: User roles, approval workflow, timestamp capture
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Show audit trail for every gate decision.

full_row.What it does: Records vehicle movement from gate into yard or parking area with stage timestamp.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves yard visibility and helps measure gate-to-yard turnaround time.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Gate-in event, yard stage configuration, vehicle/trip ID
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use for sites where parking is managed manually after entry.

full_row.What it does: Assigns parking area, slot, or zone digitally based on availability, vehicle purpose, and operational need.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Reduces congestion and improves vehicle retrieval for loading/unloading.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Parking layout, slot/zone master, queue rules
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Position as a practical step toward organized yard flow.

full_row.What it does: Provides visual yard or Kanban-style status view of vehicles by stage, location, and pending action.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Enables supervisors to identify bottlenecks quickly and move vehicles proactively.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Yard master, stage data, vehicle status updates
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use as the operations-room view for live yard control.

full_row.What it does: Allows drivers, yard jockeys, supervisors, or security users to execute yard steps through mobile or tablet without heavy hardware dependency.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Fast deployment, lower infrastructure dependency, and better adoption at open yards.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Mobile app access, user roles, geo-fence/process rules
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Best fit for sites that want a digital start before full hardware automation.

full_row.What it does: Assigns next task to driver or yard user and pushes instructions for parking, un-parking, dock movement, or exit.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Reduces manual calling and coordination gaps between parking, loading bay, and gate.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Mobile app, task logic, user/device mapping
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use this for customers facing parking-to-loading communication gaps.

full_row.What it does: Captures vehicle release from parking and movement toward dock/loading/unloading zone.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves stage visibility and reduces confusion on which vehicle should move next.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Parking allocation, dock call, user confirmation
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Show as a simple workflow to connect yard and dock operations.

full_row.What it does: Maintains vehicle queue by process, material, bay, dock, weighbridge, or priority logic.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves throughput and reduces waiting time at bottleneck points.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Queue rules, priority logic, stage timestamps
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Position as a productivity lever for high-volume plants and ports.

full_row.What it does: Tracks how long each vehicle remains in yard, parking, waiting, or idle stages.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Enables detention control, bottleneck identification, and SLA monitoring.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Stage timestamps, parking/dock/weighbridge events
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use TAT analytics to move conversation from visibility to improvement.

full_row.What it does: Assigns vehicle to loading or unloading dock based on queue, availability, process type, and real-time yard status.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves dock utilization and reduces manual bay calling.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Dock master, queue rules, loading/unloading plan
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Show how CPL connects yard waiting vehicles to dock operations.

full_row.What it does: Captures exact vehicle arrival and departure at dock or loading/unloading area.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Measures dock productivity and provides stage-wise accountability.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Dock user action, RFID/manual/mobile capture, stage configuration
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Useful to quantify loading and unloading delays.

full_row.What it does: Digitizes loading/unloading checks such as material, quantity, condition, seal, operator confirmation, and remarks.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Standardizes process adherence and improves audit readiness.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Configurable checklist, user role, process type
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Position as a configurable digital SOP for warehouse, dock, and operations teams.

full_row.What it does: Captures photos of loaded/unloaded vehicle, material, seal, or cargo condition at defined stages.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Reduces dispute and supports investigation for damage, shortage, or wrong loading/unloading.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Mobile/tablet camera, image rules, timestamp and location capture
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Good feature for high-value, export, or compliance-sensitive movements.

full_row.What it does: Records loading or unloading completion with user confirmation and optional item/material-level remarks.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves closure discipline and reduces manual proof dependency.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Material/process details, user confirmation, optional integration with WMS/ERP
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Explain as the digital replacement for handwritten loading confirmation.

full_row.What it does: Adds optional recheck point before exit or after loading/unloading for safety, quality, or compliance verification.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Reduces missed checks and supports regulated operations.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Recheck checklist, approval roles, stage configuration
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Useful for plants with safety audits or material quality checks.

full_row.What it does: Determines whether vehicle should go to weighbridge based on material, process, gate input, or operational rule.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Avoids unnecessary weighment and standardizes routing decisions.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Material/process logic, gate data, weighbridge assignment rules
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use for sites where staff manually decide weighbridge routing.

full_row.What it does: Identifies vehicle at weighbridge using RFID tag or configured digital identity before allowing weighing.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Reduces oral vehicle verification and wrong trip selection.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: RFID tag, reader, vehicle/trip mapping
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Show as the key control to reduce manual TPL/vehicle search.

full_row.What it does: Controls vehicle movement onto and off the weighbridge using traffic signals and boom barriers.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves safety and avoids unauthorized or premature movement.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Signal, barrier, controller, vehicle validation logic
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Pair this with RFID and weight capture for full WB automation story.

full_row.What it does: Uses sensors and PA announcements to guide driver for correct vehicle positioning on weighbridge.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves weighment accuracy and reduces rework caused by misalignment.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Proximity sensors, PA system, automation controller
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Position as a throughput and accuracy improvement for busy weighbridges.

feature_name: Digital Gross / Tare / Net Weight Capture

full_row.Feature Name: Digital Gross / Tare / Net Weight Capture
full_row.What it does: Captures weight digitally from weighbridge indicator or integration layer and maps it to the correct vehicle/trip.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Reduces manual entry error and improves weight data reliability.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Weighbridge indicator integration, trip/vehicle mapping
full_row.Sales Talking Point: This is the core automation outcome customers expect from WB modernization.

full_row.What it does: Maintains tare reference and validates actual weighment against expected values or configured tolerance.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Supports fraud control, exception detection, and faster validation.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Tare master, tolerance rules, vehicle category
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use where customer wants system-driven weight exception checks.

full_row.What it does: Captures vehicle or container image at weighbridge and links it to weighment record.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves evidence quality for disputes, audits, and exception investigations.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Smart camera, weighment event trigger, storage policy
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Show as visual proof of which vehicle was weighed.

full_row.What it does: Generates weighment slip and triggers configured workflow for excess/short weight or other exceptions.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Speeds up driver handover and creates structured exception resolution trail.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Printer, weight logic, approval/remark workflow
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Replace manual exception slip handling with system-led tracking.

full_row.What it does: Shows movement and status of assets such as yard equipment, mobile assets, or configured plant/port resources.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves utilization and reduces blind spots for internal assets.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Asset master, GPS/BLE/RFID/mobile data source as applicable
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use for forklift, crane, mobile equipment, or plant asset visibility discussions.

full_row.What it does: Provides visibility of user activity or employee movement where enabled by role and process design.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves task accountability and helps supervisors balance manpower.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: User mapping, app usage, location permissions if applicable
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Position carefully as operational accountability, not surveillance.

full_row.What it does: Tracks internal equipment such as forklifts, cranes, yard tractors, or other mobile assets based on configured hardware/source.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves asset allocation, safety, and operational coordination.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Hardware source, equipment master, site map/geo-fence
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Strong value-add for high-traffic yards, warehouses, and ports.

full_row.What it does: Stores historical asset movements, usage, and event trail for review and audit.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Supports productivity measurement and root-cause analysis.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Asset event data, retention policy, user access
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use for customers asking how to justify asset utilization and deployment decisions.

full_row.What it does: Provides different views and controls for security, plant operations, dock users, supervisors, and management.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves adoption by showing each stakeholder only relevant actions and reports.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Role master, user mapping, workflow permissions
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Good for multi-stakeholder rollout planning.

full_row.What it does: Tracks each vehicle through defined stages from entry to exit for plant or port operations.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Measures, analyzes, and reduces turnaround time across the complete facility flow.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Stage master, process flow, event capture points
full_row.Sales Talking Point: This is the core visibility story for CPL and CPoL.

full_row.What it does: Shows planned, pending, active, and completed vehicle movements by schedule or process stage.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves planning, coordination, and operational readiness.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Trip plan/schedule input, integration or manual creation
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use for plants that need planning visibility before vehicle arrival.

full_row.What it does: Calculates TAT by process, stage, between-stage movement, destination, staff, or operational area.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Identifies bottlenecks and quantifies improvement opportunities.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Timestamp events, stage definitions, process master
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Convert process discussion into measurable KPIs.

full_row.What it does: Summarizes checklist compliance, pending checks, failed checks, alerts, and exception records.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves proactive supervision and audit readiness.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Checklist data, alert rules, user roles
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Great for operations review meetings and daily compliance tracking.

full_row.What it does: Captures operational exceptions such as document mismatch, checklist failure, wrong stage, delay, safety issue, or weight exception.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Creates structured closure workflow and reduces informal issue handling.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Exception rules, user assignment, closure remarks
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Position as the digital action layer after visibility.

full_row.What it does: Sends configured alerts through channels such as in-app notification, email, SMS, WhatsApp, or escalation workflow where enabled.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves response time and keeps stakeholders informed in real time.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Alert rules, contact master, communication channel integration
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Useful for SLA-based exception handling and supervisor escalation.

full_row.What it does: Uses image or OCR-led validation to support unloading verification, evidence review, and mismatch identification where configured.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves unloading audit quality and reduces manual verification effort.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Images, OCR/AI model, reference documents, exception logic
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Position as an advanced value-add for unloading audit and dispute reduction.

feature_name: Port Pre-Gate / CISF / Terminal Gate Capture

full_row.Feature Name: Port Pre-Gate / CISF / Terminal Gate Capture
full_row.What it does: Captures port vehicle movement across pre-gate, security/CISF gate, terminal gate, and related entry points.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves visibility across multi-gate port operations and reduces stage ambiguity.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Port gate master, user roles, vehicle/trip token
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use for ports with multiple physical gate handoffs.

full_row.What it does: Digitizes port gate entry and exit events for internal and external vehicle movements.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves port throughput, auditability, and handoff discipline.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Gate devices/app, process master, token/trip mapping
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Explain as CPoL equivalent of plant gate automation.

full_row.What it does: Validates digital token, delivery order, Form 13, or configured port documents at relevant stages.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Reduces document errors and improves gate/stage compliance.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: ERP/TOS/AEGIS/Form 13 inputs, document master, validation rules
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Position as critical for port entry, loading, unloading, and exit control.

full_row.What it does: Captures and validates survey gate, terminal gate-out, ITT gate, or other port exit stages as per process flow.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Provides complete closure visibility and reduces missed exit events.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Port stage master, exit checklist, token/trip status
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use for end-to-end port flow from entry to final exit.

feature_name: Internal vs External Vehicle Flow Tracking

full_row.Feature Name: Internal vs External Vehicle Flow Tracking
full_row.What it does: Separates and tracks internal vehicle movements and external import/export vehicle movements within port workflows.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves operational clarity for port teams and contractors.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Vehicle category, movement type, stage configuration
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Useful for showing that CPoL supports both internal and external port flows.

full_row.What it does: Captures vessel and barge details for port operations such as discharge, loading, or transfer.

full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Vessel/barge master, berth/jetty process input
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use when explaining port-specific process depth beyond vehicle tracking.

full_row.What it does: Tracks discharge activity at berth or jetty and links vehicle/cargo movement to discharge point.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves transfer visibility and TAT measurement from vessel to yard/plot.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Berth/jetty master, discharge event data, images/checklist where required
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Show as the port equivalent of loading/unloading stage visibility.

full_row.What it does: Tracks loading and unloading at stock yard, plot, heap area, or designated cargo area.

full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Yard/plot master, vehicle/cargo mapping, stage capture
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use for ports where material moves between berth, yard, weighbridge, and exit.

full_row.What it does: Supports visibility of container or cargo location in yard, including stack/slot context where configured.

full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Yard map, stack/slot master, crane/yard updates or integration feed

full_row.What it does: Captures mid-sea or barge transfer milestones where the port process requires vessel-to-barge or barge-to-yard visibility.

full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Barge/vessel details, transfer event capture, process configuration
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use for port customers with barge or multi-leg marine movement.

full_row.What it does: Tracks rake/bridge-related movement stages and internal transfer points as part of port process flow.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves visibility of rail/bridge-linked internal cargo movement.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Rake/bridge stage master, trip/cargo mapping, event capture
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Position as configurable port process coverage.

full_row.What it does: Captures tare, gross, and net weight during port loading/unloading or external vehicle movement.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves cargo reconciliation and reduces manual weighment dependency.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Weighbridge integration, token/trip/cargo mapping
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use for ports where weighbridge is a mandatory control stage.

full_row.What it does: Uploads or links weighbridge slip, DC, or other port documents with stage event and image evidence.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves audit trail and simplifies document retrieval.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Document upload configuration, user role, stage rules
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Good demo for port document-heavy operations.

full_row.What it does: Uses configurable checklists and timestamps at port stages such as gate, weighbridge, berth, yard, and exit.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Standardizes port SOP and reveals stage-wise delays.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Port process master, checklist fields, timestamp events
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Position as configurable CPoL process digitization.

full_row.What it does: Integrates ERP, TMS, WMS, TOS, AEGIS, Form 13, weighbridge, hardware, and third-party APIs into a unified data layer.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Creates a single source of digital truth across plant and port operations.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: API/file/database access, master data, integration scope, security approvals
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use when discussing enterprise rollout and scalable architecture.

full_row.What it does: Supports software-only deployment, minimal hardware automation, or full enterprise automation with hardware supply and installation.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Lets customers choose rollout based on digital maturity, CAPEX appetite, and site complexity.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Process scope, hardware scope, integration needs, rollout plan
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Helps commercial discussion: start digital, scale to targeted hardware, then enterprise automation.

full_row.What it does: Central dashboard for trip status, vehicle status, live tracking, route tracker, and operational filters.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Single-window visibility, faster decisions, track health monitoring.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Trip/GPS/SIM/toll data feed
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Start demos here: show all active fleet status, live tracking, filters, and drill-downs.

full_row.What it does: Shows toll crossings, dhaba/POI halts, and in-transit stoppage context on the dashboard.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves route intelligence, halt analysis, and leakage/pilferage monitoring.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Toll/FasTag feed, POI enrichment
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Position as a practical control-tower input: not just location, but reason/context of movement.

full_row.What it does: Gate entry / stamping card page to capture vehicle entry and support multiple trip/tracking modes.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Standardizes entry process and enables stage-wise tracking from gate-in onwards.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Vehicle/trip master, gate process data
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Useful for plant/yard demos where trip lifecycle starts at gate entry.

feature_name: AI Repair Distance / AI True Lead Distance

full_row.Feature Name: AI Repair Distance / AI True Lead Distance
full_row.What it does: AI corrects missed pings, GPS jumps, and distance anomalies to derive reliable lead distance.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Freight cost accuracy, customer SLA compliance, and reduction in distance disputes.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Trip location feed, origin/destination, AI model
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Explain this as 'true distance' correction, especially where GPS data jumps or misses occur.

full_row.What it does: Integrates toll transaction visibility through ULIP-listed toll data and uses it as a tracking/stamping layer.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Clear visibility, fallback tracking, freight cost management, and compliance support.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: ULIP/FasTag integration access
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Show as a multi-tracking fallback after GPS/SIM and as cost-control evidence.

full_row.What it does: Detects and displays deviation from defined route or route corridor.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves route compliance, security, cost control, and pilferage prevention.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Route master / probable route / corridor logic
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use for exception-led demos: route breached, alert generated, ticket/escalation triggered.

full_row.What it does: Combines GPS and SIM-based tracking to improve trip visibility where one tracking source is weak.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Higher tracking uptime, continuity, and fewer blind spots.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: GPS feed + driver SIM consent/data
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Highlight as a practical fallback for market fleet where GPS quality varies.

full_row.What it does: Consent-based SIM tracking dashboard for trips where GPS may be unavailable or unreliable.

full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: SIM consent and telecom/location source
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Position as BYOD-friendly tracking option.

full_row.What it does: Suggests probable commercial vehicle routes using historical movement, vehicle type, route behavior, and network intelligence.

full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Historical GPS/SIM/trip data

full_row.What it does: Electronic proof of delivery to digitize delivery confirmation and POD validation.

full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Driver/customer app workflow, OTP/approval inputs
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Tie to freight settlement and delivery closure cycle.

full_row.What it does: User-facing control tower page for monitoring exceptions, follow-ups, and operational interventions.

full_row.What it does: Dashboard for route-level performance, route health, and route analytics.

full_row.What it does: Dashboard to monitor vehicle/driver documents and related compliance details.

full_row.What it does: Dashboard for pending challans/eChallan visibility and follow-up.

full_row.What it does: Supports inward trip tracking with electronic sealing, seal image checks, mismatch handling, and incident reporting.

full_row.What it does: ADAS/DMS setup for mines/fleet safety with driver and road-facing alerts.

full_row.What it does: Report for video-based alarms and alerts generated from dashcam/ADAS/DMS events.

full_row.What it does: Advanced analytics dashboard for trip, safety, performance, exception trends, and drill-down insights.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Better decision-making, performance monitoring, network visibility.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Trip/safety/alert data warehouse
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use as executive dashboard layer above day-to-day operations.

full_row.What it does: Module for trolley/asset tracking use cases.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Asset visibility and operational control for trolley-based movements.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Asset master and tracking process
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use only where customer has trolley or non-vehicle asset tracking requirement.

full_row.What it does: Supports mid-trip load transfer or truck replacement while maintaining trip/invoice continuity.

full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Transshipment event, source/destination trip linkage
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Explain for breakdowns, vehicle changes, or load transfer scenarios.

full_row.What it does: Tracks planned/unplanned trips using smart stoppage sequence analysis even when predefined route is not available.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Multi-point delivery visibility, optimized route understanding, delay/detention insight.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Historical movement and stoppage sequence data
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Strong feature when route masters are missing or operations are flexible.

full_row.What it does: Driver performance dashboard/scorecard based on driving behavior, violations, and operational metrics.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Driver coaching, transporter governance, improved safety.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Driver mapping, trip and safety events
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use with ADAS/DMS, speed, harsh braking, and compliance reports.

full_row.What it does: Driver and asset/vehicle verification in trip context.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves gate/dispatch compliance and reduces wrong vehicle/driver risk.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Driver/vehicle master, VAHAN/Sarathi where applicable
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use when customer asks for pre-dispatch or gate compliance.

full_row.What it does: Cluster view for dispatch performance and route/destination patterns.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Management visibility, dispatch optimization, cluster-level analysis.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Trip and dispatch cluster data
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Useful for cement/distribution network demos.

full_row.What it does: AI identifies likely unloading points from actual stoppage and delivery behavior.

full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Trip stoppage data, geofence/POI logic, unloading rules
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Position as AI unloading identification for invoice/delivery compliance.

full_row.What it does: Configures MCT workflows, alert routing, ticketing, and action steps.

full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Alert catalogue, users, SLA matrix
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Show as back-end configurability behind MCT execution.

full_row.What it does: Multi-camera video telematics view for 3-channel and 4-channel setups.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: 360-degree safety visibility, incident evidence, driver monitoring.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Multi-channel dashcam hardware
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use for camera configuration and safety inspection discussions.

full_row.What it does: Forklift-specific installation/use case for visibility and safety monitoring.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves internal equipment safety and asset monitoring.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Forklift device/hardware installation
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use where customer wants in-plant machine/asset safety, not only highway fleet.

full_row.What it does: Uses OCR/image intelligence to validate unloading evidence and capture key delivery/unloading data.

full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Unloading photos/documents; OCR model; geotag/time stamp
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Pitch as image-first unloading validation for high-dispute operations.

full_row.What it does: Uses GPS G-Sensor Vibrations intelligence to validate unloading evidence and capture key delivery/unloading data.
full_row.Business Value / Impact: Improves unloading accuracy, reduces manual checking, strengthens audit trail.
full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Unloading vibration model; geotag/time stamp
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Pitch as Vibration unloading validation for high-dispute operations.

full_row.What it does: Creates ticket/work item from route deviation or other critical alerts for follow-up and closure.

full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Deviation alert logic, ticket workflow, MCT users
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Connect route deviation detection to actual action, not just a red flag.

full_row.What it does: Aggregates route deviations by lane, delivery location, KM impact, and frequency.

full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Trip deviation data across lanes
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Use for management reviews where multiple trips deviate in the same pattern.

full_row.What it does: AI-led analytical reports across trip risk, lead distance, halt enrichment, unloading, and safety behavior.

full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: Data lake / trip, alert, safety feeds
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Umbrella row for AI reporting story; pair with XSight dashboard.

full_row.What it does: Tracks market fleet through API integrations and proprietary BOT method using GPS provider login credentials.

full_row.Sales Talking Point: Strong differentiator: can track fleets where API access is unavailable or fragmented.

full_row.What it does: AI identifies halt type/name such as dhaba, petrol pump, parking, unauthorized halt, etc.

full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: GPS/SIM points, POI master, AI enrichment
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Converts raw stoppage into actionable business context.

full_row.What it does: Automatically switches tracking mode from GPS to driver SIM to conductor SIM/FasTag where needed.

full_row.Dependencies / Inputs: GPS, SIM, FasTag integrations and consent
full_row.Sales Talking Point: Explain as XSWIFT's reliability layer for real-world tracking failures.

feature_name: GenAI Control Tower with WhatsApp & IVR

full_row.Feature Name: GenAI Control Tower with WhatsApp & IVR

full_row.What it does: Verifies driver DL, vehicle fitness/RC, and related compliance details using VAHAN/Sarathi interfaces.

full_row.Sales Talking Point: Useful for plant entry, dispatch gate checks, and transporter compliance.

full_row.What it does: Supports multiple unloading points under one destination cluster to avoid penalty/discrepancy.

full_row.Sales Talking Point: Pitch for networks where a single customer/destination has multiple delivery locations.

full_row.What it does: Merges virtual DO/invoice movements into a single trip when final invoice is generated later.

full_row.What it does: Tracks outbound FG delivery and inbound/raw material return leg to reduce empty runs.

full_row.What it does: Report for return journeys with third-party consignments or new return loads.

full_row.What it does: Hours-of-service and safety reports across driver and trip operations.

full_row.What it does: Captures and reports overspeeding incidents and violations.
